# 循证出题官

> Local evidence-gated Chinese exam-question workflow. Use SQLite, local llama.cpp embeddings, explicit citations, historical duplicate review, and human review gates.

## Core

- [Skill Entry](SKILL.md): minimal operating rules and command graph.
- [End-to-End Workflow](references/task_workflow.md): closed-loop task contract from runtime setup through completion.
- [Evidence Gate](references/evidence_gate.md): citation, grounding, and refusal requirements.
- [Question Rules](references/question_rules.md): item-writing and rejection rules.
- [Module Boundaries](references/module_boundaries.md): responsibility map for scripts and audit scope.

## Setup

- [llama.cpp Runtime](references/llama_cpp.md): ModelScope-first local model setup for Windows, macOS, and Linux.
- [LlamaIndex/sqlite-vec RAG And MCP](references/llamaindex_mcp.md): strict local LlamaIndex + sqlite-vec hybrid RAG path, optional external CLI/MCP retrieval, provider/base_url export, and audit guardrails.
- [SQLite Schema](references/sqlite_schema.md): database tables, provenance, fingerprints, reviews, and migrations.

## Sources And Review

- [Audit Workflow](references/audit_workflow.md): source audit, PDF/DOCX checks, and evidence completeness.
- [Current Affairs](references/current_affairs.md): dated online material collection and freshness rules.
- [Style And Difficulty](references/style_difficulty.md): style profile, cognitive level, and difficulty calibration.
- [Acceptance Checklist](references/acceptance_checklist.md): reusable validation scenarios and evaluation points.

## Local Scripts

- [CLI Wrapper](scripts/senior_exam_writer.py): command entrypoint.
- [Managed Batch Runner](scripts/run_batch.py): one-command batch path that prepares prompts, auto-starts loopback llama.cpp embeddings, ingests sources, audits duplicates, and stops the temporary server.
- [Runtime Initializer](scripts/init_modelscope_runtime.py): ModelScope GGUF discovery/download and llama-server command generation.
- [Provider Env Export](scripts/export_provider_env.py): exports OpenAI-compatible env vars from current Codex provider config for third-party tools.
- [LlamaIndex RAG Wrapper](scripts/llamaindex_rag.py): optional llamaindex-cli wrapper with explicit provider/base_url env and local JSON result caching.
- [LlamaIndex sqlite-vec RAG](scripts/llamaindex_sqlite_vec_rag.py): mandatory local RAG script for LlamaIndex file loading, node splitting, llama.cpp embeddings, sqlite-vec vector storage, FTS5+vector hybrid retrieval, source chunk hit reporting, and persisted knowledge-point bindings.
- [Library Modules](scripts/senior_exam_writer_lib/): parsing, ingest, retrieval, planning, generation, validation, review, and persistence modules.
- [Prepare Pipeline](scripts/senior_exam_writer_lib/prepare_pipeline.py): no-embedding batch preparation for prompt packages, source manifests, and next commands.
- [Source Archive](scripts/senior_exam_writer_lib/source_archive.py): file-type connector hints and original source archiving with relative directory structure.

## Notes

- Keep this map short and link-only. Add details to referenced files instead of duplicating them here.
- Use local file reads against this map before loading large references.
- Runtime evidence retrieval is vector-first against SQLite `embedding_json`; strict local source-file RAG uses LlamaIndex + sqlite-vec vectors with FTS5 only as hybrid lexical recall, persists `rag_knowledge_points` / `rag_knowledge_hits`, and any external LlamaIndex/MCP results must remain auditable.
